federation.note: The OpenClaw memory-slot ADAPTER — a thin kind:"memory" plugin (plus a pure, runtime-independent adapter core) that stores an OpenClaw agent's memory in the USER'S Solid pod via @jeswr/solid-memory. OpenClaw memory-backends map TO the shared mem:MemoryItem RDF model, so a memory written by an OpenClaw agent is readable + searchable by every other agent/app that speaks the model (mirroring how the mem0 / LangChain / Letta adapters all map onto solid-memory). All RDF goes through @jeswr/solid-memory (never hand-built); fail-closed container scope guard; PROV-O attribution (not anonymized); no remote fetch / no SSRF surface (only the injected pod fetch). GitHub-installable now (committed self-contained dist/, ignore-scripts=true; solid-memory comes from github + fetch-rdf from npm transitively); npm publish is a deferred migration, not a blocker.
